---
title: "barcode_rank_plot"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
---

## Dependencies

```{r}
#| message: false
library(DropletUtils)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

## Helper functions

```{r}
sample_ids <- LETTERS[1:8]

resolve_raw_matrix_path <- function(sample_id) {
  candidate_paths <- c(
    file.path(
      ".",
      "single_nuc_cellranger",
      "results",
      "cellranger",
      sample_id,
      "outs",
      "multi",
      "count",
      "raw_feature_bc_matrix"
    ),
    file.path(
      "..",
      "results",
      "cellranger",
      sample_id,
      "outs",
      "multi",
      "count",
      "raw_feature_bc_matrix"
    )
  )

  existing_path <- candidate_paths[file.exists(candidate_paths)][1]

  if (is.na(existing_path)) {
    stop(
      "Could not find raw_feature_bc_matrix for sample ",
      sample_id,
      ". Checked: ",
      paste(candidate_paths, collapse = ", ")
    )
  }

  existing_path
}

load_barcode_rank_data <- function(sample_id) {
  raw_matrix_path <- resolve_raw_matrix_path(sample_id)
  names(raw_matrix_path) <- sample_id

  sce <- read10xCounts(raw_matrix_path, col.names = TRUE)
  umi_sum <- sort(colSums(counts(sce)), decreasing = TRUE)
  umi_sum <- umi_sum[umi_sum >= 10]

  data.frame(
    sample_id = sample_id,
    rank = seq_along(umi_sum),
    umi_sum = as.numeric(umi_sum)
  )
}
```

## Load Cell Ranger raw matrices

```{r}
barcode_rank_data <- bind_rows(lapply(sample_ids, load_barcode_rank_data))
head(barcode_rank_data)
```

## Barcode rank plot

```{r}
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 8
log_grid_breaks <- function(min_value, max_value) {
  exponents <- seq(
    floor(log10(min_value)),
    ceiling(log10(max_value))
  )

  breaks <- as.vector(outer(c(1, 2, 5), 10^exponents))
  breaks <- sort(unique(breaks))
  breaks[breaks >= min_value & breaks <= max_value]
}

decade_label_function <- function(values) {
  is_decade <- values > 0 & abs(log10(values) - round(log10(values))) < 1e-10
  ifelse(is_decade, format(values, trim = TRUE, scientific = FALSE), "")
}

x_breaks <- log_grid_breaks(1, max(barcode_rank_data$rank))
y_breaks <- log_grid_breaks(1, 1e6)

ggplot(barcode_rank_data, aes(x = rank, y = umi_sum, colour = sample_id)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_x_log10(
    limits = c(1, max(barcode_rank_data$rank)),
    breaks = x_breaks,
    labels = decade_label_function
  ) +
  scale_y_log10(
    limits = c(1, 1e6),
    breaks = y_breaks,
    labels = decade_label_function
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Barcode rank",
    y = "UMI sum",
    colour = "Sample",
    title = "Cell Ranger raw barcode rank plot"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "grey85", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```
